Garindan is nicknamed "Long Snoot, " for his long, green-black elephantine trunk.
Like gill slits, which derive ultimately from mammals' fishy ancestors, they betray a watery phase in elephantine evolution.
In lower Egypt there is the island of Yeb or Elephantine (opposite Syene) which was an important administrative and military center.
